revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-055

A direct-current machine in which there are two field windings, one connected across the whole or part of the circuit that carries the main current and the other connected in series with the circuit that carries the main current.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Compound-wound machine}}
